title: Gold on the Road
description: A wealthy merchant named Aldric has hired the Iron Company to guard him and his cargo traveling from Dalhurst to Thornfield. Bandits have been raiding the eastern roads. Your job: protect Aldric at all costs. Multiple ambushes are expected along the route.

objectives.description: Meet Aldric the merchant at the Crossroads
Escort Aldric safely to Thornfield (keep him alive!)
Report mission success to Captain Steele

notes: Rank: Private -> Corporal. Escort quest using EscortNPC system. Aldric spawns at Crossroads. Ambush trigger zones along route spawn bandits. Quest fails if Aldric dies.
